sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n64794" key="malako/swmos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μᾰλᾰκόσωμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n64794.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">effeminate</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antioch.Astr.</author> </bibl> in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.113</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
